subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-04-19
subcodes.first_line: The above verses are very clear and explicit that we are living in the time of their fulfillment. The globe is encircled with the fire of God's wrath
subcodes.subjects: @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @critique of Western values; culture, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @predictions and prophecies, @martyrdom of the Bab, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion
